specimen.localityVerbatim:
Leech, J. H., 1892-1893. Butterflies from China, Japan and Corea 3 volumes 1 map; 43 pls. London. PLATE XXVII W.Purkiss del. Litho. Wilhelm Greve,Berlin Plate text read main text
See The Global Lepidoptera Names Index for valid names eg.

1 female, 2 male Zephyrus hecale = ESAKIOZEPHYRUS hecale Leech, 1893
3 Zephyrus pedius female = CHRYSOZEPHYRUS pedius Leech, 1893
4 Zephyrus icana male ESAKIOZEPHYRUS icana Moore, 1874
5 male, 6 female Zephyrus ataxus = CHRYSOZEPHYRUS ataxus Westwood, [1851]
7 female. 8 male Zephyrus coruscans = NEOZEPHYRUS coruscans Leech, 1893
9 Zephyrus coelestis male = Howarthia caelestis Leech, 1893
10 female, 11 male Zephyrus scintillans = Chrysozephyrus scintillans Leech, 1893
12 Zephyrus signata female = WAGIMO signata Butler, 1881
13 Rapala micans var. betuloides male = RAPALA betuloides Butler, 1881
14 Zephyrus orientalis var. suffusa = FAVONIUS orientalis ssp. suffusaLeech, 1893
15 Zephyrus quercivora female = THECLA quercivora Staudinger, 1887

notes: butterfly dorsal — head up by convention, no rotation
